nasb.text: When we entered Rome, Paul was allowed to stay by himself, with the soldier who was guarding him.

esv.text: And when we came into Rome, Paul was allowed to stay by himself, with the soldier who guarded him.

cnv.text: 我們到了羅馬，保羅獲准獨自與看守他的士兵居住。

ccb.text: 进了罗马城后，保罗获准在卫兵的看守下自己一个人住。

csbs.text: 我们进了罗马以后，保罗获准在一个士兵的看守之下，独自居住。
